market_pulse: Competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) actively promoting weekend lineups with established artists; LIV maintaining steady John Summit presence but lack of fresh talent announcements this week.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, and Hakkasan all posting daily countdown content for upcoming weekend DJs (Zedd, Lil Uzi Vert, DJ Paulyd); LIV posts are generic John Summit repeats without countdown momentum.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch fresh countdown posts for next LIV artist; use video snippets of upcoming DJ sets with trending audio.

content_gaps.description: Competitors leveraging #vegastiktok #lasvegasstrip hashtags with re-posts of guest content; LIV content is mostly official posts without community amplification.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create TikTok/IG hashtag campaign to repost guest clips; offer free table shots for tagged posts.

content_gaps.description: No recent BTS content from LIV; Hakkasan and OMNIA posting DJ prep, VIP area tours, and staff highlights.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Film LIV kitchen prep, DJ booth setup, sound check videos; post 2-3x weekly.
